name: Book of Shadows
description:
Active: Shadows

Target an enemy, ally or self. Causes the target to become untargetable from enemies to the caster, but also silenced, muted and disarmed for %duration% seconds. Applies a Basic Dispel. Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
notes: Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.
lore: An impossible tome filled with unreadable prose of unknowable thoughts.
